description: Shawn: This is my associate, Gus. Just call him Peter Panic.

Shawn:  I'm Shawn Spencer.  This Is my partner...

Gus: A fan or a stalker. Ghee Buttersnaps was said on a secure military base with no one else around.
Fun fact: Clementine Wooliesocks was never a nickname (or at least not in an episode).

Gus: That's God's comma.

Lassie: Let it go.
Dolores: Yes.
Gus: Bill Poopingtons. What kind of nickname is that?
Shawn: Transylvania Dutch. Why?
Gus: No, Shawn. No more embarrassing nicknames, especially in front of peers and professionals.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the night your dad fell asleep inside your mom. We can't just stop doing bits we've been doing for ten years. We have fans. There'll be a huge backlash.
Gus: Shawn, we are two dumbasses. We do not have fans. From now on, I do the nicknames.
Gus: No, no, no. Absolutely not. That's disgusting. Counterproposal: you have right of refusal until we land on one you like.
Gus: It's a Band-Aid, but okay for now.
Shawn: I'm terribly sorry, Dolores. What I meant to say was, my name is Shawn Spencer and this is my full-fledged partner All-The-Pips-In-One.
